caption: Accuracy of MI attacks on CIFAR-10. We evaluate 100 to 10,000 training points and compare the baseline gap attack, the confidence-vector attack that relies on a fine-grained query interface, and our label-only attacks based on data augmentation and distance to the decision boundary.
Comparison of query settings for different label-only MI attacks on CIFAR-10.
Accuracy of MI attacks on CIFAR-10 models trained with data augmentation on a subset of 2500 images.
Accuracy of membership inference attacks on CIFAR-10 models trained as in FixMatch (Sohn et al., 2020).
Test accuracy and label-only attack accuracy for various defenses. Same setup as Figure 6.
Comparison of MI attacks on various defenses.
